title: OptiOre
description: Improve your graphics and performance with the OptiOre modpack.
body:
![optiore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0adaa36cc798d071016966a884884f9b06105863.png)

# Introducing OptiOre!

OptiOre is faster than competing game clients, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.This modpack not only enhances performance but also includes shader support, zoom functionality, and connected textures! Upgrade from being a potato to a gaming powerhouse with Remarkably Optimized and unleash the full potential of your Minecraft adventure

## Why OptiOre?

The goal of OptiOre is to create a super easy way for people to increase their performance while providing just the most essential OptiFine features. It cuts back on some of the clutter in other OptiFine replacement packs that I believe most players will not use. And for the many launchers that do not support.mrpacks, I provide zip files for the mods and config files in my **[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/3as5BqExP6)** server.

## Installation :

Soon, I'm going to post full installation guides on my OptiOre YouTube channel. This tutorial for 1.20.2 shows you how to install it for the Minecraft Launcher and the Modrinth App.

## Credits :
 This modepack is  inspired by [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably) and [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).
